title: Say My Name
why_this_song: Say My Name by Destiny's Child (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 46 times; first heard in: "Say my name, say my name"
Appears 21 times; first heard in: "If no one is around you, say, "Baby I love you""
Appears 21 times; first heard in: "If you ain't runnin' game"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "You acting kind of shady, ain't callin' me baby"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "If you ain't runnin' game"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Say my name, say my name
If no one is around you, say, "Baby I love you"
Say my name, say my name
'Cause I know how you usually do
When you sayin' everything to me times two
Why can't you just tell the truth?
If somebody's there then tell me who

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "name" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "name" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Say my name, say my name

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: 'Cause I know how you usually do

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Say My Name" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Say My Name"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Destiny's Child one question about "Say My Name", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Destiny's Child sobre "Say My Name", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Say My Name" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Say My Name" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
